metadata.significance: Describes the inevitable Day of Judgment and validates the Quran

translations.en_sahih: The Inevitable Reality -
translations.en_yusufali: The Sure Reality!
translations.ms_basmeih: Saat yang tetap berlaku itu -

translations.en_sahih: What is the Inevitable Reality?
translations.en_yusufali: What is the Sure Reality?
translations.ms_basmeih: Apakah dia sifat dan keadaan saat yang tetap berlaku itu?

translations.en_sahih: And what can make you know what is the Inevitable Reality?
translations.en_yusufali: And what will make thee realise what the Sure Reality is?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apa jalannya engkau dapat mengetahui tentang sifat dan keadaan saat yang tetap berlaku itu? (Saat itu ialah hari kiamat).

translations.en_sahih: Thamud and 'Aad denied the Striking Calamity.
translations.en_yusufali: The Thamud and the 'Ad People (branded) as false the Stunning Calamity!
translations.ms_basmeih: Kaum Thamud dan Aad telah mendustakan hari (kiamat) yang menggempar dan mengharukan itu.

translations.en_sahih: So as for Thamud, they were destroyed by the overpowering [blast].
translations.en_yusufali: But the Thamud,- they were destroyed by a terrible Storm of thunder and lightning!
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka (masing-masing menerima azab dunianya) - adapun Thamud (kaum Nabi Soleh), maka mereka telah dibinasakan dengan (petir) yang melampau dahsyatnya.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَمَّا عَادٌ فَأُهْلِكُوا۟ بِرِيحٍ صَرْصَرٍ عَاتِيَةٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Waamma AAadun faohlikoo bireehin sarsarin AAatiyatin

translations.en_sahih: And as for 'Aad, they were destroyed by a screaming, violent wind
translations.en_yusufali: And the 'Ad, they were destroyed by a furious Wind, exceedingly violent;
translations.ms_basmeih: Adapun Aad (kaum Nabi Hud), maka mereka telah dibinasakan dengan angin ribut yang kencang, yang melampau kencangnya, -

ayahs.arabic: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍ وَثَمَـٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًا فَتَرَى ٱلْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Sakhkharaha AAalayhim sabAAa layalin wathamaniyata ayyamin husooman fatara alqawma feeha sarAAa kaannahum aAAjazu nakhlin khawiyatun

translations.en_sahih: Which Allah imposed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession, so you would see the people therein fallen as if they were hollow trunks of palm trees.
translations.en_yusufali: He made it rage against them seven nights and eight days in succession: so that thou couldst see the (whole) people lying prostrate in its (path), as they had been roots of hollow palm-trees tumbled down!
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang diarahkannya menyerang mereka tujuh malam lapan hari terus-menerus; (kalaulah engkau menyaksikannya) maka engkau akan melihat kaum itu bergelimpangan mati, seolah-olah mereka: batang-batang pohon kurma yang (tumbang dan) lompang.

translations.en_sahih: Then do you see of them any remains?
translations.en_yusufali: Then seest thou any of them left surviving?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dengan yang demikian, dapatkah engkau melihat lagi sisa-sisa mereka (yang masih hidup)?

ayahs.arabic: وَجَآءَ فِرْعَوْنُ وَمَن قَبْلَهُۥ وَٱلْمُؤْتَفِكَـٰتُ بِٱلْخَاطِئَةِ
ayahs.transliteration: Wajaa firAAawnu waman qablahu waalmutafikatu bialkhatiati

translations.en_sahih: And there came Pharaoh and those before him and the overturned cities with sin.
translations.en_yusufali: And Pharaoh, and those before him, and the Cities Overthrown, committed habitual Sin.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (selain dari mereka) datanglah Firaun, dan orang-orang yang terdahulu daripadanya, serta penduduk negeri-negeri yang telah ditunggang balikkan - dengan melakukan perkara-perkara yang salah.

ayahs.arabic: فَعَصَوْا۟ رَسُولَ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَهُمْ أَخْذَةً رَّابِيَةً
ayahs.transliteration: FaAAasaw rasoola rabbihim faakhathahum akhthatan rabiyatan

translations.en_sahih: And they disobeyed the messenger of their Lord, so He seized them with a seizure exceeding [in severity].
translations.en_yusufali: And disobeyed (each) the messenger of their Lord; so He punished them with an abundant Penalty.
translations.ms_basmeih: Iaitu masing-masing menderhaka kepada Rasul (yang diutuskan oleh) Tuhan mereka, lalu Allah menyeksa mereka dengan azab yang sentiasa bertambah.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا لَمَّا طَغَا ٱلْمَآءُ حَمَلْنَـٰكُمْ فِى ٱلْجَارِيَةِ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna lamma tagha almao hamalnakum fee aljariyati

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, when the water overflowed, We carried your ancestors in the sailing ship
translations.en_yusufali: We, when the water (of Noah's Flood) overflowed beyond its limits, carried you (mankind), in the floating (Ark),
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Kami, - ketika air (banjir) melampaui hadnya (serta menenggelamkan gunung-ganang), - telah mengangkut (serta menyelamatkan nenek moyang) kamu ke dalam bahtera Nabi Nuh (yang bergerak laju pelayarannya).

ayahs.arabic: لِنَجْعَلَهَا لَكُمْ تَذْكِرَةً وَتَعِيَهَآ أُذُنٌ وَٰعِيَةٌ
ayahs.transliteration: LinajAAalaha lakum tathkiratan wataAAiyaha othunun waAAiyatun

translations.en_sahih: That We might make it for you a reminder and [that] a conscious ear would be conscious of it.
translations.en_yusufali: That We might make it a Message unto you, and that ears (that should hear the tale and) retain its memory should bear its (lessons) in remembrance.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Kami lakukan yang demikian) untuk Kami jadikan peristiwa itu satu pelajaran bagi kamu, dan untuk didengar serta diambil ingat oleh telinga (orang-orang) yang mahu menerima pengajaran.

ayahs.arabic: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ نَفْخَةٌ وَٰحِدَةٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Faitha nufikha fee alssoori nafkhatun wahidatun

translations.en_sahih: Then when the Horn is blown with one blast
translations.en_yusufali: Then, when one blast is sounded on the Trumpet,
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian (ketahuilah bahawa) apabila ditiup Sangkakala dengan sekali tiup, -

ayahs.arabic: وَحُمِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ فَدُكَّتَا دَكَّةً وَٰحِدَةً
ayahs.transliteration: Wahumilati alardu waaljibalu fadukkata dakkatan wahidatan

translations.en_sahih: And the earth and the mountains are lifted and leveled with one blow -
translations.en_yusufali: And the earth is moved, and its mountains, and they are crushed to powder at one stroke,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bumi serta gunung-ganang diangkat (dari tempatnya) lalu dihancurkan keduanya dengan sekali hancur, -

translations.en_sahih: Then on that Day, the Resurrection will occur,
translations.en_yusufali: On that Day shall the (Great) Event come to pass.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka pada saat itu berlakulah hari kiamat, -

translations.en_sahih: And the heaven will split [open], for that Day it is infirm.
translations.en_yusufali: And the sky will be rent asunder, for it will that Day be flimsy,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan terbelahlah langit, lalu menjadilah ia pada saat itu reput (dan runtuh),

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلْمَلَكُ عَلَىٰٓ أَرْجَآئِهَا ۚ وَيَحْمِلُ عَرْشَ رَبِّكَ فَوْقَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ ثَمَـٰنِيَةٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Waalmalaku AAala arjaiha wayahmilu AAarsha rabbika fawqahum yawmaithin thamaniyatun

translations.en_sahih: And the angels are at its edges. And there will bear the Throne of your Lord above them, that Day, eight [of them].
translations.en_yusufali: And the angels will be on its sides, and eight will, that Day, bear the Throne of thy Lord above them.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sedang malaikat-malaikat (ditempatkan) mengawal segala penjurunya, dan Arasy Tuhanmu pada saat itu dipikul oleh lapan malaikat di atas malaikat-malaikat yang mengawal itu.

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ تُعْرَضُونَ لَا تَخْفَىٰ مِنكُمْ خَافِيَةٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Yawmaithin tuAAradoona la takhfa minkum khafiyatun

translations.en_sahih: That Day, you will be exhibited [for judgement]; not hidden among you is anything concealed.
translations.en_yusufali: That Day shall ye be brought to Judgment: not an act of yours that ye hide will be hidden.
translations.ms_basmeih: Pada hari itu, kamu semua dihadapkan (untuk hitungan amal); tidak ada sesuatu pun yang tersembunyi (kepada Allah) dari perkara-perkara kamu yang tersembunyi.

ayahs.arabic: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ هَآؤُمُ ٱقْرَءُوا۟ كِتَـٰبِيَهْ
ayahs.transliteration: Faamma man ootiya kitabahu biyameenihi fayaqoolu haomu iqraoo kitabiyah

translations.en_sahih: So as for he who is given his record in his right hand, he will say, "Here, read my record!
translations.en_yusufali: Then he that will be given his Record in his right hand will say: "Ah here! Read ye my Record!
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka sesiapa yang diberikan menerima Kitab amalnya dengan tangan kanannya, maka ia akan berkata (dengan sukacitanya kepada sesiapa yang ada di sisinya): ` Nah! Bacalah kamu Kitab amalku ini!

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, I was certain that I would be meeting my account."
translations.en_yusufali: "I did really understand that my Account would (One Day) reach me!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sesungguhnya aku telah mengetahui dengan yakin, bahawa aku akan menghadapi hitungan amalku (pada hari yang ditentukan)!"

translations.en_sahih: So he will be in a pleasant life -
translations.en_yusufali: And he will be in a life of Bliss,
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka (dengan itu) tinggalah dia dalam kehidupan yang senang lenang lagi memuaskan, -

translations.en_sahih: In an elevated garden,
translations.en_yusufali: In a Garden on high,
translations.ms_basmeih: Di dalam Syurga yang tinggi (darjatnya), -

translations.en_sahih: Its [fruit] to be picked hanging near.
translations.en_yusufali: The Fruits whereof (will hang in bunches) low and near.
translations.ms_basmeih: Buah-buahannya dekat untuk dipetik.

ayahs.arabic: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَآ أَسْلَفْتُمْ فِى ٱلْأَيَّامِ ٱلْخَالِيَةِ
ayahs.transliteration: Kuloo waishraboo haneean bima aslaftum fee alayyami alkhaliyati

translations.en_sahih: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you put forth in the days past."
translations.en_yusufali: "Eat ye and drink ye, with full satisfaction; because of the (good) that ye sent before you, in the days that are gone!"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Masing-masing dipersilakan menikmatinya dengan dikatakan): "Makan dan minumlah kamu makanan dan minuman sebagai nikmat yang lazat dan baik kesudahannya, dengan sebab (amal-amal soleh) yang telah kamu kerjakan pada masa yang lalu (di dunia)!"

ayahs.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِشِمَالِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى لَمْ أُوتَ كِتَـٰبِيَهْ
ayahs.transliteration: Waamma man ootiya kitabahu bishimalihi fayaqoolu ya laytanee lam oota kitabiyah

translations.en_sahih: But as for he who is given his record in his left hand, he will say, "Oh, I wish I had not been given my record
translations.en_yusufali: And he that will be given his Record in his left hand, will say: "Ah! Would that my Record had not been given to me!
translations.ms_basmeih: Adapun orang yang diberikan menerima Kitab amalnya dengan tangan kirinya, maka ia akan berkata (dengan sesalnya): "Alangkah baiknya kalau aku tidak diberikan Kitab amalku, -

translations.en_sahih: And had not known what is my account.
translations.en_yusufali: "And that I had never realised how my account (stood)!
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan aku tidak dapat mengetahui hitungan amalku.

translations.en_sahih: I wish my death had been the decisive one.
translations.en_yusufali: "Ah! Would that (Death) had made an end of me!
translations.ms_basmeih: "Alangkah baiknya kalau kematianku di dunia dahulu, menjadi kematian pemutus (yang menamatkan kesudahanku, tidak dibangkitkan lagi); -

translations.en_sahih: My wealth has not availed me.
translations.en_yusufali: "Of no profit to me has been my wealth!
translations.ms_basmeih: "Harta kekayaanku tidak dapat menolongku sedikitpun; -

translations.en_sahih: Gone from me is my authority."
translations.en_yusufali: "My power has perished from me!"...
translations.ms_basmeih: Kuat kuasaku (dan hujjah-hujjahku membela diri), telah binasa dan hilang lenyap dariku".

translations.en_sahih: [Allah will say], "Seize him and shackle him.
translations.en_yusufali: (The stern command will say): "Seize ye him, and bind ye him,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Lalu diperintahkan malaikat penjaga neraka): "Tangkaplah orang yang berdosa itu serta belenggulah dia, -

translations.en_sahih: Then into Hellfire drive him.
translations.en_yusufali: "And burn ye him in the Blazing Fire.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Kemudian bakarlah dia di dalam neraka Jahiim; -

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ فِى سِلْسِلَةٍ ذَرْعُهَا سَبْعُونَ ذِرَاعًا فَٱسْلُكُوهُ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma fee silsilatin tharAAuha sabAAoona thiraAAan faoslukoohu

translations.en_sahih: Then into a chain whose length is seventy cubits insert him."
translations.en_yusufali: "Further, make him march in a chain, whereof the length is seventy cubits!
translations.ms_basmeih: "Selain dari itu, masukkanlah dia dalam (lingkaran) rantai besi yang ukuran panjangnya tujuh puluh hasta, (dengan membelitkannya ke badannya)!

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لَا يُؤْمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
ayahs.transliteration: Innahu kana la yuminu biAllahi alAAatheemi

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, he did not used to believe in Allah, the Most Great,
translations.en_yusufali: "This was he that would not believe in Allah Most High.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sesungguhnya dia dahulu tidak beriman kepada Allah Yang Maha Besar,

translations.en_sahih: Nor did he encourage the feeding of the poor.
translations.en_yusufali: "And would not encourage the feeding of the indigent!
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan dia juga tidak menggalakkan (dirinya dan orang lain) memberi makanan (yang berhak diterima oleh) orang miskin.

translations.en_sahih: So there is not for him here this Day any devoted friend
translations.en_yusufali: "So no friend hath he here this Day.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Maka pada hari ini, tidak ada baginya di sini (seorangpun dari) kaum kerabat serta sahabat handai (yang dapat menolongnya), -

translations.en_sahih: Nor any food except from the discharge of wounds;
translations.en_yusufali: "Nor hath he any food except the corruption from the washing of wounds,
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan tidak ada makanan (baginya) melainkan dari air danur,

translations.en_sahih: None will eat it except the sinners.
translations.en_yusufali: "Which none do eat but those in sin."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Yang tidak memakannya melainkan orang-orang yang melakukan perkara yang salah".

translations.en_sahih: So I swear by what you see
translations.en_yusufali: So I do call to witness what ye see,
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Aku bersumpah: Demi segala (yang nyata) yang kamu melihatnya, -

translations.en_sahih: And what you do not see
translations.en_yusufali: And what ye see not,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan segala (yang ghaib) yang kamu tidak melihatnya, -

translations.en_sahih: [That] indeed, the Qur'an is the word of a noble Messenger.
translations.en_yusufali: That this is verily the word of an honoured messenger;
translations.ms_basmeih: Bahawa sesungguhnya Al-Quran itu ialah (wahyu dari Kami) yang disampaikan oleh Rasul yang mulia.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَاعِرٍ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama huwa biqawli shaAAirin qaleelan ma tuminoona

translations.en_sahih: And it is not the word of a poet; little do you believe.
translations.en_yusufali: It is not the word of a poet: little it is ye believe!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bukanlah Al-Quran itu perkataan seorang penyair (sebagaimana yang kamu dakwakan. Tetapi sayang!) amatlah sedikit kamu beriman.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَا بِقَوْلِ كَاهِنٍ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wala biqawli kahinin qaleelan ma tathakkaroona

translations.en_sahih: Nor the word of a soothsayer; little do you remember.
translations.en_yusufali: Nor is it the word of a soothsayer: little admonition it is ye receive.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan juga bukanlah Al-Quran itu perkataan seorang pawang (sebagaimana yang kamu katakan. Tetapi sayang!) amatlah sedikit kamu mengambil peringatan.

translations.en_sahih: [It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds.
translations.en_yusufali: (This is) a Message sent down from the Lord of the Worlds.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Al-Quran itu) diturunkan dari Allah Tuhan sekalian alam.

translations.en_sahih: And if Muhammad had made up about Us some [false] sayings,
translations.en_yusufali: And if the messenger were to invent any sayings in Our name,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan kalaulah (Nabi Muhammad yang menyampaikan Al-Quran itu) mengatakan atas nama Kami secara dusta - sebarang kata-kata rekaan, -

translations.en_sahih: We would have seized him by the right hand;
translations.en_yusufali: We should certainly seize him by his right hand,
translations.ms_basmeih: Sudah tentu Kami akan menyentapnya, dengan kekuasaan Kami, -

translations.en_sahih: Then We would have cut from him the aorta.
translations.en_yusufali: And We should certainly then cut off the artery of his heart:
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian sudah tentu Kami akan memutuskan tali jantungnya (supaya ia mati dengan serta-merta);

ayahs.arabic: فَمَا مِنكُم مِّنْ أَحَدٍ عَنْهُ حَـٰجِزِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fama minkum min ahadin AAanhu hajizeena

translations.en_sahih: And there is no one of you who could prevent [Us] from him.
translations.en_yusufali: Nor could any of you withhold him (from Our wrath).
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka tidak ada seorangpun di antara kamu yang dapat menghalang (tindakan Kami itu) daripada menimpanya.

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, the Qur'an is a reminder for the righteous.
translations.en_yusufali: But verily this is a Message for the Allah-fearing.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya (Al-Quran) itu tetap menjadi peringatan bagi orang-orang yang bertaqwa.

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, We know that among you are deniers.
translations.en_yusufali: And We certainly know that there are amongst you those that reject (it).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Kami sedia mengetahui bahawa ada di antara kamu yang mendustakan (Al-Quran, maka Kami akan membalasnya).

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, it will be [a cause of] regret upon the disbelievers.
translations.en_yusufali: But truly (Revelation) is a cause of sorrow for the Unbelievers.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Al-Quran itu sudah tentu akan menyebabkan penyesalan bagi orang-orang yang kafir (semasa mereka menerima balasan).

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, it is the truth of certainty.
translations.en_yusufali: But verily it is Truth of assured certainty.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Al-Quran itu adalah kebenaran yang diyakini (dengan seyakin-yakinnya).

translations.en_sahih: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.
translations.en_yusufali: So glorify the name of thy Lord Most High.
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu bertasbihlah dengan memuji nama Tuhanmu Yang Maha Besar.
